name: live-consultant
description: Adaptive business consulting, direct-response marketing, sales, funnels, Meta ads, operations, decisions, and evidence-gated learning from corrections and outcomes.

interface.shortDescription: Direct business clarity, bold offers, execution
interface.longDescription: Diagnose business bottlenecks, create bold direct-response offers, audit ideas and operating systems, design funnels and Meta experiments, solve sales and operations problems, and compound from corrections and measured outcomes through private, evidence-gated project learning.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose the real bottleneck in my business.
Create three bold direct-response offers for this audience.
Explain what is broken, why it matters, and the strongest next move.
